name: Baldur's Gate 3
description: Baldur’s Gate 3 is a story-rich, party-based RPG set in the universe of Dungeons & Dragons, where your choices shape a tale of fellowship and betrayal, survival and sacrifice, and the lure of absolute power.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
  • Processor: Intel I5 4690 / AMD FX 8350 / Snapdragon X Elite
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GTX 970 / RX 480 / Intel Arc A380 / Qualcomm Adreno X1 (4GB+ of VRAM)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 150 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: SSD required
comment1:
I have too many hours in this game. This has been my favioute game for several years now. I even finished honour mode. It is high time I left a review.

Absolute cinema - everything out of 10. Perfection.
comment2:
At first I was not sure I wanted to buy it
I was afraid that I would not like it when I played it
But
This game became the best game of my life
I loved all the features of the game from the dialogues to the characterization to ...

Anyway, the only negative thing I can say about it is the photo mode of the game, which I expected much more and better from it

If you recently bought the game
Have fun
comment3:
A game in which a random book/rune you read at your first hours can change the outcome of a conversation you are making near your last hours. Splendid, a must play if you are interested in RPG!

Also you can pet animals which is enough just by itself
